title: Festive Fruit Crumble
description: A sweet and tangy dessert featuring a crunchy crumble topping and a festive twist.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the gooey brown sugar and festive mixed berries.
Add the gelatin to the bowl and stir until dissolved.
Transfer the mixture to a 9x9-inch baking dish.
In a separate bowl, mix together the crumble topping and garlicky butter.
Spread the crumble mixture evenly over the top of the berry mixture.
Bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the topping is golden brown and the fruit is bubbly.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes before serving.
